meta.title: Kitsoki — a dev story, end to end on the slidey repo

personas.name: Priya
personas.intro: Turns a one-line idea into a validated PRD and a mockup deck.

personas.name: Arden
personas.intro: Shapes requirements into a design epic, slices, and ADRs.

personas.name: Devin
personas.intro: Decomposes, fixes a mid-stream bug, refines, and ships — every step traceable.

scenes.title: From an idea to a merged PR
scenes.subtitle: one feature and one bug, end to end, on the slidey repo
scenes.narration: This is one dev story end to end on the slidey repository — from a product idea to a merged pull request, with kitsoki driving every step.

scenes.title: The cast
scenes.caption: Three roles, one shared, traceable pipeline — every hand-off a notification, every artifact a validated, replayable output.
scenes.narration: A product manager, an architect, and a developer share one traceable pipeline. Every hand-off is a notification, and every artifact is a validated, replayable output.

scenes.title: Who does what

cases.action: Frames a one-line idea into a PRD + mockups
Turns the requirements into a design
Decomposes the design into a work plan
Fixes a bug that lands mid-stream
Refines the feature from demo videos
Opens the pull requests

scenes.narration: Across the story, the product manager frames the idea, the architect designs it, and the developer decomposes, fixes a bug, refines the feature, and opens the pull requests.

scenes.title: 1 · Idea → PRD + mockups

cases.action: Types a one-line idea: add a feature to slidey
Answers clarifying questions; a PRD is drafted
Publishes the validated PRD + mockups

scenes.caption: The PRD and mockups are the validated output of the product-manager phase.
scenes.narration: The product manager starts with a one-line idea: add a feature to slidey. Kitsoki runs a conversation-driven intake — clarifying questions, a drafted PRD, and a mockup deck — and the PRD plus mockups are the validated output.

scenes.title: Idea → PRD + mockups
scenes.caption: Conversation-driven PRD intake on the slidey repo
scenes.narration: Here the PM drives the intake live: the brief is refined into a PRD and a mockup deck, all replayed deterministically with no model in the loop.

scenes.title: 2 · Requirements → design

cases.action: Reviews the new PRD and asks questions
Produces the design epic, slices, and ADRs
Publishes the design, summarised in a slidey deck

scenes.caption: The design — an epic broken into slices, with ADRs — is the architect phase's validated output.
scenes.narration: The architect is notified that new requirements are ready. They review, ask questions, and produce the design — an epic broken into slices, ADRs, and mermaid diagrams — summarised in a slidey deck.

scenes.title: Requirements → design
scenes.caption: PRD → design epic, slices, and ADRs
scenes.narration: The architect walks from the PRD into a structured design, with each slice and decision captured as a traceable artifact.

scenes.title: 3 · Design → work plan

cases.action: Reviews the published design
Decomposes the epic and slices into right-sized tasks
Validates the work plan
cases.detail: runs in the background — it takes time

scenes.caption: The decomposed work plan is the output — and because it takes time, it runs in the background.
scenes.narration: The developer reviews the new design and decomposes its epic and slices into right-sized tasks. The work plan is the output, and because it takes time, it runs in the background.

scenes.title: Design → work plan
scenes.caption: Design epic decomposed into agent-sized briefs
scenes.narration: The design is decomposed into a validated manifest of agent-sized briefs, ready to fan out into development.

scenes.title: 4 · A bug lands mid-stream

cases.action: Triage recommends a one-shot, unsupervised fix
cases.detail: a new slidey bug is opened

cases.action: Says go — kitsoki reproduces, fixes, tests, self-reviews
cases.detail: in an isolated worktree, real test suite

cases.action: Validates the fix — closing out PR-ready

scenes.caption: While the decomposition runs, the bug-fix room triages, fixes, and validates a real slidey bug.
scenes.narration: Mid-stream, a bug is opened against slidey. The bug-fix room triages it as a one-shot unsupervised fix. The developer says go, and kitsoki reproduces, fixes, tests, reviews, and validates it — closing out ready for a pull request.

scenes.title: Bug → reproduce → fix → validate
scenes.caption: The bug-fix pipeline on a real slidey bug
scenes.narration: Every room is a deterministic state-machine beat: reproduce, propose, implement in a worktree, run the real test suite, self-review, and validate.

scenes.title: 5 · Demo videos → spatial refine

cases.action: Reviews demo videos that land in the inbox
cases.detail: as tasks complete in the background

cases.action: Points at an exact element on the rendered frame
An anchored refine edits precisely that scene

scenes.caption: The developer refines the functionality by pointing right at it — location-tied, spatial-oracle feedback.
scenes.narration: The work plan moves into background development. As portions complete, demo videos arrive in the inbox, and the developer refines the functionality by pointing right at it — location-tied, spatial-oracle feedback.

scenes.title: Demo videos → spatial refine
scenes.caption: Annotate the rendered frame → an anchored refine pass
scenes.narration: A reviewer points at an exact element on the rendered frame, and that anchor flows into a refine pass that edits precisely what was pointed at.

scenes.title: 6 · Open the PRs

cases.action: Reviews the bug-fix summary + validation video
Opens the pull request on slidey
Opens the feature epic's PR with its demo video

scenes.caption: The story closes where it started: a slidey repo, now two pull requests richer — every step on the record.
scenes.narration: The bug fix is done; the developer reviews its summary and opens the pull request. Then the feature epic's PR goes up with its demo video. Two pull requests, every step on the record.

scenes.title: Summary → open PR
scenes.caption: Reproduction + validation summary → pull request
scenes.narration: The summary carries the reproduction and validation evidence straight into the pull request.
And the whole film is a no-LLM, byte-deterministic replay: the runtime is a state machine, and the model is just a traceable callee.
scenes.tagline: Every frame is a deterministic, no-LLM replay
scenes.url: the runtime is a state machine; the model is a traceable callee
